/* src/styles/themes/primary-color.css */

@import 'tailwindcss';

/* ============================================
   PRIMARY COLOR SYSTEM
   Register color tokens in @theme so Tailwind
   generates utility classes like bg-primary,
   text-primary-500, etc.
   ============================================ */
@theme {
  --color-primary: hsl(var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) var(--primary-l));
  --color-primary-hover: hsl(
    var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) - 8%)
  );
  --color-primary-active: hsl(
    var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) - 15%)
  );
  --color-primary-disabled: hsl(
    var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) + 20%)
  );

  --color-primary-50: hsl(var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) 97%);
  --color-primary-100: hsl(var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) 90%);
  --color-primary-200: hsl(var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) 80%);
  --color-primary-300: hsl(var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) 70%);
  --color-primary-400: hsl(var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) 60%);
  --color-primary-500: hsl(var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) var(--primary-l));
  --color-primary-600: hsl(
    var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) - 10%)
  );
  --color-primary-700: hsl(
    var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) - 20%)
  );
  --color-primary-800: hsl(
    var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) - 30%)
  );
  --color-primary-900: hsl(
    var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) - 40%)
  );
}

/* ============================================
   BASE HSL VALUES & THEME VARIANTS
   These CSS variables drive the dynamic color
   system. Changing the class on <html> or a
   parent element switches the entire palette.
   ============================================ */
@layer base {
  :root {
    --primary-h: 0;
    --primary-s: 84%;
    --primary-l: 45%;
  }

  .primary-color-blue {
    --primary-h: 239;
    --primary-s: 50%;
    --primary-l: 50%;
  }

  .primary-color-green {
    --primary-h: 142;
    --primary-s: 60%;
    --primary-l: 40%;
  }

  .primary-color-red {
    --primary-h: 0;
    --primary-s: 84%;
    --primary-l: 45%;
  }

  .primary-color-orange {
    --primary-h: 25;
    --primary-s: 84%;
    --primary-l: 45%;
  }

  .primary-color-purple {
    --primary-h: 262;
    --primary-s: 83%;
    --primary-l: 45%;
  }

  /* ---- Dark mode overrides ---- */
  .dark {
    --color-primary: hsl(
      var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) + 10%)
    );
    --color-primary-hover: hsl(
      var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) + 18%)
    );
    --color-primary-active: hsl(
      var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) + 25%)
    );

    --color-primary-50: hsl(var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) 18%);
    --color-primary-100: hsl(var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) 25%);
    --color-primary-200: hsl(var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) 32%);
    --color-primary-300: hsl(var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) 40%);
    --color-primary-400: hsl(var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) 48%);
    --color-primary-500: hsl(
      var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) + 10%)
    );
    --color-primary-600: hsl(
      var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) + 20%)
    );
    --color-primary-700: hsl(
      var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) + 30%)
    );
    --color-primary-800: hsl(
      var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) + 40%)
    );
    --color-primary-900: hsl(
      var(--primary-h) var(--primary-s) calc(var(--primary-l) + 50%)
    );
  }

  .dark.primary-color-green {
    --primary-l: 70%;
  }

  .dark.primary-color-red {
    --primary-l: 50%;
  }

  .dark.primary-color-orange {
    --primary-l: 50%;
  }

  .dark.primary-color-purple {
    --primary-l: 50%;
  }
}

/* src/styles/themes/semantic.css */

/* ============================================
   SEMANTIC COLOR TOKENS
   Register semantic tokens in @theme so Tailwind
   generates utilities like bg-surface-primary,
   text-content-primary, border-semantic-light, etc.
   
   NOTE: Naming avoids collision with Tailwind's
   built-in `text-*` (font-size) and `bg-primary`
   (from primary color system). We use namespaced
   prefixes: content-*, surface-*, semantic-*.
   ============================================ */
@theme {
  /* --- Text / Content Colors --- */
  --color-content-primary: var(--text-primary);
  --color-content-secondary: var(--text-secondary);
  --color-content-tertiary: var(--text-tertiary);
  --color-content-inverse: var(--text-inverse);
  --color-content-disabled: var(--text-disabled);
  --color-content-placeholder: var(--text-placeholder);
  --color-content-link: var(--text-link);
  --color-content-link-hover: var(--text-link-hover);
  --color-content-success: var(--text-success);

  /* --- Background / Surface Colors --- */
  --color-surface-primary: var(--surface-primary);
  --color-surface-secondary: var(--surface-secondary);
  --color-surface-tertiary: var(--surface-tertiary);
  --color-surface-hover: var(--surface-hover);
  --color-surface-inverse: var(--bg-inverse);
  --color-surface-error: var(--bg-error);
  --color-surface-input: var(--bg-input);
  --color-surface-overlay: var(--bg-overlay);
  --color-surface-overlay-light: var(--bg-overlay-light);

  /* --- Background Opacity Variants --- */
  --color-surface-primary-5: var(--bg-primary-5);
  --color-surface-primary-10: var(--bg-primary-10);
  --color-surface-primary-20: var(--bg-primary-20);
  --color-surface-primary-30: var(--bg-primary-30);
  --color-surface-primary-40: var(--bg-primary-40);
  --color-surface-primary-50: var(--bg-primary-50);
  --color-surface-primary-60: var(--bg-primary-60);
  --color-surface-primary-70: var(--bg-primary-70);
  --color-surface-primary-80: var(--bg-primary-80);
  --color-surface-primary-90: var(--bg-primary-90);

  /* --- Primary Light Background Variants --- */
  --color-surface-primary-light: var(--bg-primary-light);
  --color-surface-primary-light-10: var(--bg-primary-light-10);
  --color-surface-primary-light-20: var(--bg-primary-light-20);
  --color-surface-primary-light-30: var(--bg-primary-light-30);
  --color-surface-primary-light-40: var(--bg-primary-light-40);
  --color-surface-primary-light-50: var(--bg-primary-light-50);

  /* --- Border Colors --- */
  --color-border-extra-light: var(--border-extra-light);
  --color-border-light: var(--border-light);
  --color-border-medium: var(--border-medium);
  --color-border-dark: var(--border-dark);
  --color-border-focus: var(--border-focus);
  --color-border-primary: var(--border-primary);
  --color-border-error: var(--border-error);
  --color-border-success: var(--border-success);
  --color-border-warning: var(--border-warning);
  --color-border-input: var(--border-input);

  /* --- Ring --- */
  --color-ring-primary: var(--ring);
  --color-ring-focus: var(--border-focus);

  /* --- Transitions --- */
  --transition-smooth: all var(--duration-base) var(--ease-smooth);
  --transition-fast: all var(--duration-fast) var(--ease-out);
  --transition-slow: all var(--duration-slow) var(--ease-out);
}

/* ============================================
   SEMANTIC CSS VARIABLES (Light & Dark)
   These drive the @theme tokens above.
   ============================================ */
@layer base {
  :root,
  .light {
    /* --- Text --- */
    --text-primary: var(--color-gray-900);
    --text-secondary: var(--color-gray-600);
    --text-tertiary: var(--color-gray-500);
    --text-inverse: var(--color-white);
    --text-disabled: var(--color-gray-400);
    --text-placeholder: var(--color-gray-400);
    --text-link: var(--color-primary);
    --text-link-hover: var(--color-primary-hover);
    --text-success: var(--color-success);

    /* --- Background --- */
    --bg-primary: var(--color-white);
    --bg-secondary: var(--color-slate-300);
    --bg-tertiary: var(--color-slate-200);
    --bg-inverse: var(--color-slate-900);
    --bg-error: var(--color-danger-500);
    --bg-input: var(--color-slate-100);
    --bg-overlay: var(--color-slate-400);
    --bg-overlay-light: var(--color-slate-300);

    /* --- Background Opacity Variants --- */
    --bg-primary-5: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
    --bg-primary-10: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    --bg-primary-20: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
    --bg-primary-30: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
    --bg-primary-40: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
    --bg-primary-50: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
    --bg-primary-60: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    --bg-primary-70: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
    --bg-primary-80: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
    --bg-primary-90: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);

    /* --- Primary Light Variants --- */
    --bg-primary-light: var(--color-primary-50);
    --bg-primary-light-10: var(--color-primary-100);
    --bg-primary-light-20: var(--color-primary-200);
    --bg-primary-light-30: var(--color-primary-300);
    --bg-primary-light-40: var(--color-primary-400);
    --bg-primary-light-50: var(--color-primary-500);

    /* --- Border --- */
    --border-extra-light: var(--color-slate-200);
    --border-light: var(--color-slate-300);
    --border-medium: var(--color-slate-500);
    --border-dark: var(--color-slate-600);
    --border-focus: rgba(0, 174, 255, 1);
    --border-primary: var(--color-primary);
    --border-error: var(--color-danger-500);
    --border-success: var(--color-success-500);
    --border-warning: var(--color-warning-500);
    --border-input: var(--color-slate-700);

    /* --- Ring --- */
    --ring: var(--color-primary);

    /* --- Surface --- */
    --surface-primary: var(--color-white);
    --surface-secondary: var(--color-slate-50);
    --surface-tertiary: var(--color-slate-100);
    --surface-hover: var(--color-slate-100);
  }

  .dark {
    /* --- Text --- */
    --text-primary: var(--color-white);
    --text-secondary: var(--color-gray-100);
    --text-tertiary: var(--color-gray-400);
    --text-inverse: var(--color-gray-900);
    --text-disabled: var(--color-gray-600);
    --text-placeholder: var(--color-gray-600);
    --text-link: var(--color-primary-400);
    --text-link-hover: var(--color-primary-300);

    /* --- Background --- */
    --bg-primary: var(--color-slate-950);
    --bg-secondary: var(--color-slate-800);
    --bg-tertiary: var(--color-slate-800);
    --bg-inverse: var(--color-white);
    --bg-error: var(--color-danger-500);
    --bg-input: var(--color-slate-900);
    --bg-overlay: var(--color-slate-500);
    --bg-overlay-light: var(--color-slate-600);

    /* --- Background Opacity Variants --- */
    --bg-primary-5: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05);
    --bg-primary-10: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.1);
    --bg-primary-20: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.2);
    --bg-primary-30: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.3);
    --bg-primary-40: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.4);
    --bg-primary-50: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.5);
    --bg-primary-60: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.6);
    --bg-primary-70: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.7);
    --bg-primary-80: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.8);
    --bg-primary-90: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.9);

    /* --- Primary Light Variants --- */
    --bg-primary-light: var(--color-primary-900);
    --bg-primary-light-10: var(--color-primary-800);
    --bg-primary-light-20: var(--color-primary-700);
    --bg-primary-light-30: var(--color-primary-600);
    --bg-primary-light-40: var(--color-primary-500);
    --bg-primary-light-50: var(--color-primary-400);

    /* --- Border --- */
    --border-extra-light: var(--color-slate-100);
    --border-light: var(--color-slate-400);
    --border-medium: var(--color-slate-500);
    --border-dark: var(--color-slate-600);
    --border-focus: var(--color-blue-400);
    --border-error: var(--color-danger-500);
    --border-success: var(--color-success-500);
    --border-warning: var(--color-warning-500);
    --border-primary: var(--color-primary);

    /* --- Surface --- */
    --surface-primary: var(--color-slate-900);
    --surface-secondary: var(--color-slate-800);
    --surface-tertiary: var(--color-slate-700);
    --surface-hover: var(--color-slate-700);
  }
}

FILE: src\styles\themes\semantic-gradients.css

/* src/styles/themes/semantic-gradients.css */

/* ============================================
   GRADIENT CSS VARIABLES (Light & Dark)
   Dynamic gradient tokens that reference other
   CSS variables (colors, surfaces). Cannot be
   placed in @theme because they use var() chains
   that resolve at runtime based on theme class.
   ============================================ */
@layer base {
  :root,
  .light {
    --gradient-page-primary: linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      var(--bg-primary) 0%,
      var(--color-primary-50) 50%,
      var(--bg-primary) 100%
    );
    --gradient-page-general: linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      var(--color-slate-100) 0%,
      var(--bg-primary) 50%,
      var(--color-slate-200) 100%
    );
    --gradient-hero: linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      var(--color-primary-50) 0%,
      var(--bg-primary) 50%,
      var(--color-primary-100) 100%
    );
    --gradient-card: linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      var(--surface-primary) 0%,
      var(--surface-secondary) 100%
    );
    --gradient-cta: linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      var(--color-primary-500),
      var(--color-primary-600)
    );
    --gradient-shine: linear-gradient(
      90deg,
      transparent,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2),
      transparent
    );
    --gradient-logo: linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      var(--color-primary-500),
      var(--color-primary-600)
    );
    --text-gradient-primary: linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      var(--color-primary-600),
      var(--color-primary-500)
    );
    --border-gradient-primary: linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      var(--color-primary-400),
      var(--color-primary-600)
    );
    --gradient-btn-primary: linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      var(--color-primary-500),
      var(--color-primary-600)
    );
    --gradient-btn-primary-hover: linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      var(--color-primary-600),
      var(--color-primary-700)
    );
    --gradient-btn-danger: linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      var(--color-danger-500),
      var(--color-danger-600)
    );
    --gradient-gold: linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      var(--color-amber-400),
      var(--color-amber-600)
    );
    --gradient-silver: linear-gradient(
      135deg,

/* ============================================
   GRADIENT THEME TOKENS
   Register gradient values in @theme so Tailwind
   generates bg-gradient-hero, bg-gradient-card, etc.
   Uses CSS var() references to stay theme-aware.
   ============================================ */
@theme {
  --background-image-gradient-page-primary: var(--gradient-page-primary);
  --background-image-gradient-page-general: var(--gradient-page-general);
  --background-image-gradient-hero: var(--gradient-hero);
  --background-image-gradient-card: var(--gradient-card);
  --background-image-gradient-cta: var(--gradient-cta);
  --background-image-gradient-logo: var(--gradient-logo);
  --background-image-gradient-gold: var(--gradient-gold);
  --background-image-gradient-silver: var(--gradient-silver);
  --background-image-gradient-copper: var(--gradient-copper);
  --background-image-gradient-azure: var(--gradient-azure);
  --background-image-gradient-teal: var(--gradient-teal);
  --background-image-gradient-rose: var(--gradient-rose);
  --background-image-gradient-emerald: var(--gradient-emerald);
  --background-image-gradient-amber: var(--gradient-amber);
  --background-image-gradient-indigo: var(--gradient-indigo);
  --background-image-gradient-btn-primary: var(--gradient-btn-primary);
  --background-image-gradient-btn-danger: var(--gradient-btn-danger);
}

/* ============================================
   TEXT GRADIENT UTILITIES
   Cannot be auto-generated by Tailwind because
   they require background-clip: text + color: transparent.
   These must remain as manual utility classes.
   ============================================ */
@layer utilities {
  /* Reusable mixin-like base for text gradients */
  .text-gradient-base {
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    background-clip: text;
    color: transparent;
  }

  .text-gradient-primary {
    background: var(--text-gradient-primary);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    background-clip: text;
    color: transparent;
  }

  .text-gradient-gold {
    background: var(--gradient-gold);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    background-clip: text;
    color: transparent;
  }

  .text-gradient-silver {
    background: var(--gradient-silver);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    background-clip: text;
    color: transparent;
  }

  .text-gradient-azure {
    background: var(--gradient-azure);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    background-clip: text;
    color: transparent;
  }

  /* Shine animation effect using pseudo-element.
     Cannot be replicated with Tailwind utilities alone
     because it requires ::after + left animation. */
  .gradient-shine {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .gradient-shine::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: var(--gradient-shine);
    transition: left 0.5s ease;
  }

  .gradient-shine:hover::after {
    left: 100%;
  }
}

/* globals.css ГўвӮ¬вҖқ Animation System Section */

/* ============================================
   CUSTOM DURATION & EASING TOKENS
   Only values NOT built into Tailwind v4.
   Built-in: duration-0/75/100/150/200/300/500/700/1000
   Built-in: ease-linear, ease-in, ease-out, ease-in-out
   ============================================ */
@theme {
  /* Custom durations beyond Tailwind defaults */
  --transition-duration-instant: 0ms;
  --transition-duration-ultra-slow: 800ms;

  /* Custom easing functions not in Tailwind */
  --transition-timing-function-bounce: cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55);
  --transition-timing-function-elastic: cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55);
  --transition-timing-function-smooth: cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
  --transition-timing-function-bounce-soft: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.2, 0.64, 1);

  /* ===== Animation shorthand tokens =====
     Registers full animation values so Tailwind
     generates animate-fade-in, animate-slide-in-top, etc. */

  /* Fade animations */
  --animate-fade-in: fade-in 200ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1) forwards;
  --animate-fade-out: fade-out 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1) forwards;
  --animate-fade-in-up: fade-in-up 300ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1) forwards;
  --animate-fade-in-down: fade-in-down 300ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1) forwards;
  --animate-fade-in-left: fade-in-left 300ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1) forwards;
  --animate-fade-in-right: fade-in-right 300ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1)
    forwards;

  /* Slide animations */
  --animate-slide-in-top: slide-in-top 300ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1) forwards;
  --animate-slide-out-top: slide-out-top 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1)
    forwards;
  --animate-slide-in-bottom: slide-in-bottom 300ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1)
    forwards;
  --animate-slide-out-bottom: slide-out-bottom 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1)
    forwards;
  --animate-slide-in-left: slide-in-left 300ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1)
    forwards;
  --animate-slide-out-left: slide-out-left 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1)
    forwards;
  --animate-slide-in-right: slide-in-right 300ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1)
    forwards;
  --animate-slide-out-right: slide-out-right 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1)
    forwards;

  /* Scale animations */
  --animate-scale-in: scale-in 200ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1) forwards;
  --animate-scale-out: scale-out 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1) forwards;
  --animate-scale-elastic: scale-elastic 300ms
    cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) forwards;

  /* Continuous / looping animations */
  --animate-pulse-soft: pulse-soft 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  --animate-bounce-soft: bounce-soft 1.5s ease infinite;
  --animate-float: float 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  --animate-float-soft: float-soft 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  --animate-wiggle: wiggle 0.5s ease-in-out;
  --animate-shake: shake 0.3s ease-in-out;
  --animate-glow: glow 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  --animate-ripple: ripple 0.6s ease-out;
  --animate-swing: swing 0.5s ease-in-out;
  --animate-spin-slow: spin 2s linear infinite;
  --animate-shimmer: shimmer 1.5s infinite;
}

/* ============================================
   CUSTOM KEYFRAMES
   Only keyframes NOT built into Tailwind v4.
   Built-in: spin, ping, pulse, bounce
   ============================================ */
@theme {
  --keyframes-fade-in: {
    from {
      opacity: 0;
    }
    to {
      opacity: 1;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-fade-out: {
    from {
      opacity: 1;
    }
    to {
      opacity: 0;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-fade-in-up: {
    from {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }
  };
  --keyframes-fade-in-down: {
    from {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(-20px);
    }
    to {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
    }
  };
  --keyframes-fade-in-left: {
    from {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateX(-20px);
    }
    to {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateX(0);
    }
  };
  --keyframes-fade-in-right: {
    from {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateX(20px);
    }
    to {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateX(0);
    }
  };
  --keyframes-slide-in-top: {
    from {
      transform: translateY(-100%);
      opacity: 0;
    }
    to {
      transform: translateY(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-slide-out-top: {
    from {
      transform: translateY(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }
    to {
      transform: translateY(-100%);
      opacity: 0;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-slide-in-bottom: {
    from {
      transform: translateY(100%);
      opacity: 0;
    }
    to {
      transform: translateY(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-slide-out-bottom: {
    from {
      transform: translateY(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }
    to {
      transform: translateY(100%);
      opacity: 0;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-slide-in-left: {
    from {
      transform: translateX(-100%);
      opacity: 0;
    }
    to {
      transform: translateX(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-slide-out-left: {
    from {
      transform: translateX(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }
    to {
      transform: translateX(-100%);
      opacity: 0;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-slide-in-right: {
    from {
      transform: translateX(100%);
      opacity: 0;
    }
    to {
      transform: translateX(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-slide-out-right: {
    from {
      transform: translateX(0);
      opacity: 1;
    }
    to {
      transform: translateX(100%);
      opacity: 0;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-scale-in: {
    from {
      transform: scale(0.9);
      opacity: 0;
    }
    to {
      transform: scale(1);
      opacity: 1;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-scale-out: {
    from {
      transform: scale(1);
      opacity: 1;
    }
    to {
      transform: scale(0.9);
      opacity: 0;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-scale-elastic: {
    0% {
      transform: scale(0.9);
      opacity: 0;
    }
    70% {
      transform: scale(1.05);
      opacity: 0.8;
    }
    100% {
      transform: scale(1);
      opacity: 1;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-pulse-soft: {
    0%,
    100% {
      opacity: 1;
    }
    50% {
      opacity: 0.8;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-bounce-soft: {
    0%,
    100% {
      transform: translateY(0);
    }
    50% {
      transform: translateY(-10px);
    }
  };
  --keyframes-shimmer: {
    0% {
      background-position: -200% 0;
    }
    100% {
      background-position: 200% 0;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-float: {
    0%,
    100% {
      transform: translateY(0);
    }
    50% {
      transform: translateY(-10px);
    }
  };
  --keyframes-float-soft: {
    0%,
    100% {
      transform: translateY(0);
    }
    50% {
      transform: translateY(-5px);
    }
  };
  --keyframes-wiggle: {
    0%,
    100% {
      transform: rotate(0deg);
    }
    25% {
      transform: rotate(-5deg);
    }
    75% {
      transform: rotate(5deg);
    }
  };
  --keyframes-shake: {
    0%,
    100% {
      transform: translateX(0);
    }
    25% {
      transform: translateX(-5px);
    }
    75% {
      transform: translateX(5px);
    }
  };
  --keyframes-glow: {
    0%,
    100% {
      box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2);
    }
    50% {
      box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.5);
    }
  };
  --keyframes-ripple: {
    0% {
      transform: scale(0);
      opacity: 0.5;
    }
    100% {
      transform: scale(4);
      opacity: 0;
    }
  };
  --keyframes-swing: {
    20% {
      transform: rotate(15deg);
    }
    40% {
      transform: rotate(-10deg);
    }
    60% {
      transform: rotate(5deg);
    }
    80% {
      transform: rotate(-5deg);
    }
    100% {
      transform: rotate(0deg);
    }
  };
}

/* ============================================
   SHIMMER UTILITY
   Requires both background + animation together,
   cannot be split into separate Tailwind utilities.
   ============================================ */
@layer utilities {
  .animate-shimmer {
    background: linear-gradient(
      90deg,
      transparent,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2),
      transparent
    );
    background-size: 200% 100%;
    animation: shimmer 1.5s infinite;
  }
}

/* ============================================
   SCROLL REVEAL CLASSES
   JS-driven state classes (.active toggled via
   IntersectionObserver). Cannot be replicated
   with Tailwind utilities alone because they
   depend on external state toggling.
   ============================================ */
@layer utilities {
  .reveal {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(30px);
    transition: all 0.8s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1);
  }

  .reveal.active {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }

  .reveal-left {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateX(-30px);
    transition: all 0.8s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1);
  }

  .reveal-left.active {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateX(0);
  }

  .reveal-right {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateX(30px);
    transition: all 0.8s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1);
  }

  .reveal-right.active {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateX(0);
  }

  .reveal-scale {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.95);
    transition: all 0.8s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1);
  }

  .reveal-scale.active {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
  }
}

/* Edge animations */
@keyframes dash {
  to {
    stroke-dashoffset: -24;
  }
}

@keyframes flow {
  0% {
    stroke-dashoffset: 24;
  }
  100% {
    stroke-dashoffset: 0;
  }
}

@keyframes glow {
  0%,
  100% {
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 2px currentColor);
  }
  50% {
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px currentColor);
  }
}

.animate-dash {
  stroke-dasharray: 5 5;
  animation: dash 1s linear infinite;
}

.animate-flow {
  stroke-dasharray: 8 8;
  animation: flow 1s linear infinite;
}

.animate-glow {
  animation: glow 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

/* src/styles/tokens/colors.css */
/* Tailwind v4 compatible */

/* ============================================
   LAYER BASE: Dynamic HSL variables for all semantic colors.
   Computed scales use calc(), so they must live in @layer base
   (not @theme, which expects resolvable design tokens).
   The --raw- prefix prevents name collisions / circular references
   with the @theme tokens defined further below.
   ============================================ */
@layer base {
  :root {
    /* --- Secondary --- */
    --secondary-h: 215;
    --secondary-s: 25%;
    --secondary-l: 50%;

    /* Raw computed shade scale */
    --raw-secondary-50: hsl(
      var(--secondary-h),
      var(--secondary-s),
      calc(var(--secondary-l) * 1.8)
    );
    --raw-secondary-100: hsl(
      var(--secondary-h),
      var(--secondary-s),
      calc(var(--secondary-l) * 1.6)
    );
    --raw-secondary-200: hsl(
      var(--secondary-h),
      var(--secondary-s),
      calc(var(--secondary-l) * 1.4)
    );
    --raw-secondary-300: hsl(
      var(--secondary-h),
      var(--secondary-s),
      calc(var(--secondary-l) * 1.2)
    );
    --raw-secondary-400: hsl(
      var(--secondary-h),
      var(--secondary-s),
      var(--secondary-l)
    );
    --raw-secondary-500: hsl(
      var(--secondary-h),
      var(--secondary-s),
      var(--secondary-l)
    );
    --raw-secondary-600: hsl(
      var(--secondary-h),
      var(--secondary-s),
      calc(var(--secondary-l) * 0.85)
    );
    --raw-secondary-700: hsl(
      var(--secondary-h),
      var(--secondary-s),
      calc(var(--secondary-l) * 0.7)
    );
    --raw-secondary-800: hsl(
      var(--secondary-h),
      var(--secondary-s),
      calc(var(--secondary-l) * 0.55)
    );
    --raw-secondary-900: hsl(
      var(--secondary-h),
      var(--secondary-s),
      calc(var(--secondary-l) * 0.4)
    );

    /* Semantic state aliases */
    --secondary: var(--raw-secondary-500);
    --secondary-fg: hsl(0 0% 100%);
    --secondary-hover: var(--raw-secondary-600);
    --secondary-active: var(--raw-secondary-700);
    --secondary-disabled: var(--raw-secondary-300);

    /* --- Success --- */
    --success-h: 142;
    --success-s: 76%;
    --success-l: 50%;

    --raw-success-50: hsl(
      var(--success-h),
      var(--success-s),
      calc(var(--success-l) * 1.8)
    );
    --raw-success-100: hsl(
      var(--success-h),
      var(--success-s),
      calc(var(--success-l) * 1.6)
    );
    --raw-success-200: hsl(
      var(--success-h),
      var(--success-s),
      calc(var(--success-l) * 1.4)
    );
    --raw-success-300: hsl(
      var(--success-h),
      var(--success-s),
      calc(var(--success-l) * 1.2)
    );
    --raw-success-400: hsl(
      var(--success-h),
      var(--success-s),
      var(--success-l)
    );
    --raw-success-500: hsl(
      var(--success-h),
      var(--success-s),
      var(--success-l)
    );
    --raw-success-600: hsl(
      var(--success-h),
      var(--success-s),
      calc(var(--success-l) * 0.85)
    );
    --raw-success-700: hsl(
      var(--success-h),
      var(--success-s),
      calc(var(--success-l) * 0.7)
    );
    --raw-success-800: hsl(
      var(--success-h),
      var(--success-s),
      calc(var(--success-l) * 0.55)
    );
    --raw-success-900: hsl(
      var(--success-h),
      var(--success-s),
      calc(var(--success-l) * 0.4)
    );

    --success: var(--raw-success-500);
    --success-fg: hsl(0 0% 100%);
    --success-hover: var(--raw-success-600);
    --success-active: var(--raw-success-700);
    --success-disabled: var(--raw-success-300);

    /* --- Danger --- */
    --danger-h: 0;
    --danger-s: 84%;
    --danger-l: 50%;

    --raw-danger-50: hsl(
      var(--danger-h),
      var(--danger-s),
      calc(var(--danger-l) * 1.8)
    );
    --raw-danger-100: hsl(
      var(--danger-h),
      var(--danger-s),
      calc(var(--danger-l) * 1.6)
    );
    --raw-danger-200: hsl(
      var(--danger-h),
      var(--danger-s),
      calc(var(--danger-l) * 1.4)
    );
    --raw-danger-300: hsl(
      var(--danger-h),
      var(--danger-s),
      calc(var(--danger-l) * 1.2)
    );

  }

   utilities (bg-secondary-500, text-danger, border-info-300, ...).
   "inline" is required here because the underlying values are
   runtime CSS variables that change in dark mode ГўвӮ¬вҖқ utilities must
   reference them directly instead of snapshotting a static value.
   ============================================ */

    --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
    --shadow-xl: 0 20px 25px -5px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
    --shadow-2xl: 0 25px 50px -12px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.25);
    --shadow-3xl: 0 35px 60px -15px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.3);
    --shadow-inner: inset 0 2px 4px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05);
  }

  .dark {
    --shadow-xs: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.3);
    --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4);
    --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4);
    --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4);
    --shadow-xl: 0 20px 25px -5px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4), 0 8px 10px -6px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4);
    --shadow-2xl: 0 25px 50px -12px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.5);
    --shadow-3xl: 0 35px 60px -15px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.5);
    --shadow-inner: inset 0 2px 4px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.3);
  }
}

  --shadow-lg: var(--shadow-lg);

// src/types/auth.ts

// Application roles used for routing and access decisions
export type UserRole = 'admin' | 'engineer' | 'customer' | 'staff';

// Authenticated user stored in the client session.
// `mobile` and `email` are both optional since a user may register with either one.
export interface User {
  id: string;
  fullName: string;
  mobile?: string;
  email?: string;
  avatar?: string;
  role: UserRole;
  imageUrl?: string;
}
export type AppUser = User;



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: src\types\index.ts
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
/* src/types/index.ts */
import { TextDirection } from "@/utils/textDirection";
import { _Translator } from "next-intl";
import { ReactNode } from "react";

/* ============================================================
 * Category
 * Single source of truth, aligned with the real Aparat API.
 * `title` kept optional as a UI-friendly alias used by some components.
 * ============================================================ */
export interface Category {
  cat_id: number; // numeric category id from Aparat
  cat_name: string; // category display name
  cat_cnt: number; // number of videos in this category
  link: string; // canonical Aparat link for the category
  title?: string; // optional alias of cat_name for UI components
}

export interface CategoryWithVideos extends Category {
  data: VideoListItem[]; // videos belonging to this category
}

/* ============================================================
 * Video list item
 * Lightweight shape used by the Playlist and video lists.
 * Field names match the real Aparat API output.
 * ============================================================ */
export interface VideoListItem {
  createdAtTimestamp: number;
  id: number; // numeric video id
  uid: string; // public string id used in URLs/embeds
  title: string;
  username: string; // owner channel username
  userid: number; // owner channel id
  visit_cnt: number; // numeric view count
  process: string; // processing state of the video
  small_poster: string; // small thumbnail url
  big_poster: string; // large thumbnail url
  duration: number; // duration in seconds
  sdate: string; // human-readable date string from Aparat
  frame: string; // embed/frame url
  official: string; // "yes" | "no" flag from Aparat
  autoplay: boolean;
  "360d": boolean; // 360-degree video flag
  categoryId?: number; // resolved category id, when available
  categoryName?: string; // resolved category title, or "Uncategorized"
  titleDir: TextDirection; // precomputed in the API normalization layer
}

/* ============================================================
 * Video item (player)
 * Extends the list shape with player-only fields.
 * `frame` is inherited from VideoListItem, so it is NOT redeclared
 * here to avoid an optional/required mismatch on extension.
 * ============================================================ */
export interface VideoItem extends VideoListItem {
  description?: string;
  file_link?: string; // direct file link, when available
}

/* ============================================================
 * Full video info (detailed payload)
 * ============================================================ */
export interface VideoInfo {
  id: number;
  title: string;
  username: string;
  userid: number;
  visit_cnt: number;
  uid: string;
  process: string;
  sender_name: string;
  big_poster: string;
  small_poster: string;
  profilePhoto: string;
  duration: number;
  sdate: string;
  frame: string;
  official: string;
  tags: string[];
  description: string;
  cat_id: number;
  cat_name: string;
  autoplay: boolean;
  "360d": boolean;
  has_comment: string;
  has_comment_txt?: string;
  size?: number;
  can_download: boolean;
  like_cnt: number;
}

/* ============================================================
 * Profiles
 * ============================================================ */
export interface Profile {
  username: string;
  name: string;
  avatar: string;
  followers?: number;
}

export interface UserProfile {
  id: number;
  username: string;
  name: string;
  pic: string;
  pic_s: string;
  pic_m: string;
  pic_b: string;
  banned: "yes" | "no";
  email?: string;
  mobile_number?: string;
  mobile_valid?: string;
  ltoken?: string;
}

export interface ChannelProfile {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  username: string;
  pic_s?: string;
  pic_m?: string;
  video_cnt?: number;
}

/* ============================================================
 * Channel info
 * ============================================================ */
export interface ChannelInfo {
  pic_s: string;
  pic_m: string;
  pic_b: string;
  username: string;
  name: string;
  video_cnt: number;
  url: string;
  follower_cnt: number;
  followed_cnt: number;
  descr: string;
  official: string;
  cover_src: string;
  avatar: string;
  followers: number;
}

/* ============================================================
 * API response wrappers
 * ============================================================ */
export interface ProfileResponse {
  profile: UserProfile;
}

export interface ChannelResponse {
  channel: ChannelInfo;
}

export interface ProfileCategoriesResponse {
  profilecategories: Category[];
}

export interface VideoByUserResponse {
  videobyuser: VideoListItem[];
}

export interface VideoResponse {
  video: VideoInfo;
}

export interface VideoByProfileCatResponse {
  videobyprofilecat: VideoListItem[];
}

/* ============================================================
 * Component props
 * ============================================================ */
export interface ChannelHeaderProps {
  channel: Profile | null;
  children?: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
}

export interface VideoPlayerProps {
  video: VideoInfo | null;
}

export interface PlaylistProps {
  videos: VideoListItem[];
  currentVideoId: number | null;
  onVideoSelect: (video: VideoListItem) => void;
  categories?: Category[];
  totalVideos?: number;
  isLoadingMore?: boolean;
  loadedCount?: number;
  title?: string;
  hasMore?: boolean;
  onLoadMore?: () => void;
}

export interface ChannelStatsProps {
  videoCount: number;
  followerCount: number;
  followedCount: number;
  official: string;
}

export interface CategoryTabsProps {
  categories: Category[];
  activeCategoryId: number | null;
  onCategorySelect: (categoryId: number | null) => void;
}

export interface VideoCardProps {
  video: VideoListItem;
  isActive: boolean;
  onClick: () => void;
}

/* ============================================================
 * Misc
 * ============================================================ */
export interface LiveStream {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  username: string;
  viewer_count: number;
  status: string;
}

export interface SearchSuggestion {
  text: string;
  count: number;
  type: "suggestion" | "history";
}



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: src\types\stats.ts
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
import type { LucideIcon } from "lucide-react";

/**
 * A single statistic item shown in the StatsSection.
 * - id: stable unique key used for React lists
 * - value: the target numeric value to count up to
 * - suffix: optional unit appended after the number (e.g. "k", "+", "/7")
 * - labelKey: i18n key resolved via next-intl (namespace "Stats")
 * - icon: optional Lucide icon component rendered above the number
 */
export interface StatItem {
  id: string;
  value: number;
  suffix?: string;
  labelKey: string;
  icon?: LucideIcon;
}
export interface AparatChannel {
  username: string;
  name: string;
  avatar: string;
  followers: number;
  videoCount: number;
}

export interface AparatVideo {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  thumbnail: string;
  duration: number;
  views: number;
  createdAt: string;
  embedUrl: string;
}



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: src\utils\aparatUtils.ts
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/utils/aparatUtils.tsx

import { VideoItem, Category, VideoListItem } from "@/types";
import type { _Translator } from "next-intl";

// Group videos by the category name attached during fetch. Categories keep
// their original order; anything without a category falls into "Uncategorized".
export function groupVideosByCategory(
  videos: VideoListItem[],
): Record<string, VideoListItem[]> {
  const grouped: Record<string, VideoListItem[]> = {};

  for (const video of videos) {
    // categoryName is set client-side by useAparatChannel; no casts needed.
    const key =
      video.categoryName && video.categoryName.trim().length > 0
        ? video.categoryName
        : "Uncategorized";

    if (!grouped[key]) grouped[key] = [];
    grouped[key].push(video);
  }

  return grouped;
}

export function sortCategoryNames(categoryNames: string[]): string[] {
  return categoryNames.sort((a, b) => {
    if (a === "All Videos") return -1;
    if (b === "All Videos") return 1;
    if (a === "Uncategorized") return 1;
    if (b === "Uncategorized") return -1;
    return a.localeCompare(b);
  });
}

export function formatDuration(seconds: number): string {
  if (!seconds || isNaN(seconds)) return "0:00";
  const hours = Math.floor(seconds / 3600);
  const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);
  const secs = seconds % 60;

  if (hours > 0) {
    return `${hours}:${minutes.toString().padStart(2, "0")}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, "0")}`;
  }
  return `${minutes}:${secs.toString().padStart(2, "0")}`;
}

export function formatViews(views: number): string {
  if (!views || isNaN(views)) return "0";
  if (views >= 1000000) return `${(views / 1000000).toFixed(1)}M`;
  if (views >= 1000) return `${(views / 1000).toFixed(1)}K`;
  return views.toString();
}

/**
 * Ultra-light relative time formatter.
 * No parsing. Only math.
 */
export function formatRelativeTime(timestamp: number, t: _Translator): string {
  const diffSeconds = Math.floor((Date.now() - timestamp) / 1000);

  if (diffSeconds < 60) {
    return t("second", { value: diffSeconds });
  }

  const minutes = Math.floor(diffSeconds / 60);
  if (minutes < 60) {
    return t("minute", { value: minutes });
  }

  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);
  if (hours < 24) {
    return t("hour", { value: hours });
  }

  const days = Math.floor(hours / 24);
  if (days < 30) {
    return t("day", { value: days });
  }

  const months = Math.floor(days / 30);
  if (months < 12) {
    return t("month", { value: months });
  }

  const years = Math.floor(days / 365);
  return t("year", { value: years });
}



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: src\utils\dateParser.ts
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
/**
 * Normalize Persian/Arabic digits to English digits.
 */
function normalizeDigits(value: string): string {
  return value
    .replace(/[\u06F0-\u06F9]/g, (d) => String(d.charCodeAt(0) - 0x06f0))
    .replace(/[\u0660-\u0669]/g, (d) => String(d.charCodeAt(0) - 0x0660));
}

/**
 * Fast Aparat date parsing.
 * Used only once when mapping API data.
 */
export function parseAparatDateToTimestamp(dateStr: string): number {
  if (!dateStr) return Date.now();

  const clean = normalizeDigits(dateStr).split(" ")[0].split("T")[0];

  const parts = clean.split(/[/-]/);

  if (parts.length < 3) return Date.now();

  const year = Number(parts[0]);
  const month = Number(parts[1]);
  const day = Number(parts[2]);

  const gYear = year < 1700 ? year + 621 : year;

  return new Date(gYear, month - 1, day).getTime();
}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// src/utils/textDirection.ts

export type TextDirection = 'rtl' | 'ltr';

// Arabic + Persian + Hebrew letter ranges (any of these means RTL content).
const RTL_CHAR = /[\u0591-\u07FF\uFB1D-\uFDFD\uFE70-\uFEFC]/;
// Latin letters (incl. accented) used to detect pure-English text.
const LTR_CHAR = /[A-Za-z\u00C0-\u024F]/;

/**
 * Detect the base writing direction of a string.
 *
 * Rule (per product requirement):
 *  - If the text contains ANY Persian/Arabic/Hebrew letter, treat the whole
 *    string as RTL ГўвӮ¬вҖқ even when it also contains English words/numbers
 *    (mixed content stays right-aligned like Persian).
 *  - Return 'ltr' ONLY when the text is purely Latin (no RTL letter at all).
 *  - Empty/missing text defaults to 'rtl' (Persian-first UI).
 */
export function getTextDirection(
  text: string | null | undefined,
): TextDirection {
  if (!text) return 'rtl'; // Persian-first default for empty/missing text.

  let hasLtr = false;

  // Scan the entire string instead of stopping at the first strong char,
  // so a leading English word never flips a Persian title to LTR.
  for (const ch of text) {
    if (RTL_CHAR.test(ch)) return 'rtl'; // Any RTL letter => whole text is RTL.
    if (!hasLtr && LTR_CHAR.test(ch)) hasLtr = true;
  }

  // No RTL letter found: LTR only if there was real Latin text, else default.
  return hasLtr ? 'ltr' : 'rtl';
}

// Map of Western (0-9) and Arabic-Indic digits to Persian (Farsi) digits.
const PERSIAN_DIGITS = ['ГӣВ°', 'ГӣВұ', 'ГӣВІ', 'ГӣВі', 'ГӣВҙ', 'ГӣВө', 'ГӣВ¶', 'ГӣВ·', 'ГӣВё', 'ГӣВ№'];

/**
 * Convert all Western (0-9) and Arabic-Indic (ГҷВ -ГҷВ©) digits in a string to
 * Persian digits (ГӣВ°-ГӣВ№). Non-digit characters are left untouched.
 */
export function toPersianDigits(text: string | null | undefined): string {
  if (!text) return '';

  return text.replace(/[0-9\u0660-\u0669]/g, (digit) => {
    // Western digits: charCode - 48 (e.g. '0' => 0). Arabic-Indic: -0x0660.
    const code = digit.charCodeAt(0);
    const value = code <= 57 ? code - 48 : code - 0x0660;
    return PERSIAN_DIGITS[value];
  });
}

/**
 * Localize the display form of a title:
 *  - Persian/mixed (RTL) titles get Persian digits.
 *  - Pure-English (LTR) titles keep their Western digits.
 */
export function localizeTitle(
  text: string | null | undefined,
  dir: TextDirection = getTextDirection(text),
): string {
  if (!text) return '';
  return dir === 'rtl' ? toPersianDigits(text) : text;
}

/**
 * Attach a computed `titleDir` and a localized `displayTitle` to any object
 * that has a `title` field. Call this once during API normalization so every
 * consumer reads precomputed values instead of recomputing per render.
 */
export function withTitleDirection<T extends { title: string }>(
  item: T,
): T & { titleDir: TextDirection; displayTitle: string } {
  const titleDir = getTextDirection(item.title);
  return {
    ...item,
    titleDir,
    // Persian/mixed titles render with Persian numerals; English stays as-is.
    displayTitle: localizeTitle(item.title, titleDir),
  };
}
